name: TRIGGER2MARKER
description: Interactive tool to decode 8-bit trigger codes to markers for actiCHamp amplifiers. Simulates Digital Port Settings behavior.

name: Tone Generator
description: Generate pulsed tones and binaural beats for EEG auditory stimulation paradigms.

name: Screen Flicker
description: Generate screen flicker stimuli for SSVEP experiments.

name: USB Battery Pack Tests
description: Low-power load retention test results for USB battery packs used in portable EEG setups.
